recommendations.title: Koi... Mil Gaya
recommendations.overview: A developmentally disabled boy's life changes after he encounters an extraterrestrial being.

recommendations.title: Krrish 3
recommendations.overview: Krrish and his father must team up to save the world from a psychokinetic evil man named Kaal and his army of mutants.

recommendations.title: Karan Arjun
recommendations.overview: Karan and Arjun reincarnate in the different parts of the country. But the faith of their previous mother brings them together in order to avenge their death.

recommendations.title: Krrish
recommendations.overview: In Singapore, Krishna is forced by circumstances to use his superpowers and become a masked superhero named Krrish, before getting drawn towards his lost legacy.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys I've Loved Before
recommendations.overview: Lara Jean's love life goes from imaginary to out of control when her secret letters to every boy she's ever fallen for are mysteriously mailed out.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: Fucking Berlin

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.
